pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Nexus Staging plugin with Central Publishing Maven Plugin to use the new Maven Central Publisher Portal.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to enforce dependency upper bounds.
Update Checkstyle plugin and configuration to Practical-Google-style v1.2.
Refactor SCM and URL definitions to use a variable for the repository name.
Add a 'strict' profile to enable verbose javadoc validation and checkstyle checks.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to 3.6.3 and remove explicit Java API links.
Update developer email and organization name to reflect current affiliation.

README.adoc.general_idea: Replace Travis CI build status badge with GitHub Actions workflow badge to reflect the migration of the CI pipeline.
Update the Maven Central artifact link to point to the new Central Publisher Portal URL instead of the legacy search URL.
Add documentation explaining the purpose of the 'release' and 'strict' Maven profiles introduced in the migration.
README.adoc.human_impl: - The `release` profile is meant for quick and easy releases to Maven Central.
